title: Head of Revenue Operations
location: New York (with Tel Aviv HQ collaboration)
description: Finout, a cloud cost-management SaaS company with 100+ employees across Tel Aviv and New York, seeks a Head of Revenue Operations reporting to the CRO. The role requires 7+ years in RevOps, Sales Ops, or Strategy within high-growth B2B SaaS, with proven experience scaling revenue operations beyond $30M+ ARR. Candidates need deep Salesforce administration and revenue analytics expertise, strong cross-functional leadership across Sales, Marketing, Finance, and HR, and a leader-doer mindset comfortable building flows, dashboards, and data models while collaborating with the Tel Aviv HQ across time zones.
score_reason: Omri is a perfect match: 15+ years B2B SaaS RevOps experience far exceeds the 7+ year requirement, strong Salesforce admin background aligns with core needs, and proven expertise in pipeline forecasting and revenue scaling directly addresses the $30M+ ARR scaling mandate. The leader-doer mindset and cross-functional GTM experience match the role's requirements perfectly.
ai_opener: Omri, I came across Finout's Head of Revenue Operations role and immediately thought of you—a cloud cost-management company scaling revenue operations at HubSpot/Salesforce maturity level is exactly where your 15+ years of B2B SaaS RevOps leadership creates immediate impact. With your deep pipeline forecasting and cross-functional scaling experience, you'd be the technical operations leader that bridges Tel Aviv HQ strategy with New York GTM execution that Finout needs.

title: RevOps Manager, Territory Strategy & Operations
description: Gong seeks a RevOps Manager focused on territory strategy and operations. The role requires deep understanding of B2B SaaS go-to-market models, sales territories, and segmentation strategies, plus strong analytical skills with Excel, SQL, and BI tools like Tableau and Retool. Responsibilities include redesigning territory models for global scalability, partnering with Sales leadership, Strategy and Finance to optimize territory compositions, analyzing performance and account data, and maintaining accurate territory mapping in tools like Fullcast and Salesforce. Salary range is $149,000–$175,000 USD plus incentive compensation.
score_reason: Excellent match for a senior RevOps executive—territory strategy and B2B SaaS GTM optimization align perfectly with Omri's core strengths. Strong technical requirements (Salesforce, SQL, BI tools, Fullcast) and strategic scope fit his seniority level and revenue operations expertise.
ai_opener: Omri here—I've spent 15+ years optimizing go-to-market models and sales operations in B2B SaaS, including deep work on territory design, pipeline forecasting, and Salesforce/BI stack optimization. Gong's focus on territory strategy at scale caught my attention; I'd love to explore how my experience redesigning territory models and partnering with sales/finance leadership could accelerate your global expansion.

title: Revenue Operations Manager - Systems
description: Flex seeks a Revenue Operations Manager to build, own, and scale the operational backbone for its New Verticals division. Reporting to the Head of Revenue Operations, this is the first dedicated RevOps hire for New Verticals, responsible for standing up systems, processes, and data infrastructure. Requires 5+ years in Revenue Operations, Sales Operations, or GTM Operations with 2+ years in a senior/lead capacity, deep Salesforce configuration expertise (Admin Certification preferred), and familiarity with GTM systems like Outreach, LeanData, Clay, and HubSpot. With 15+ years architecting Salesforce stacks, GTM systems integration, and revenue processes across high-growth B2B SaaS, I've been in this exact seat before and can accelerate your time to operational maturity significantly.
